chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 805 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.6766/2023 (S/A) 19.02.2024 M/s Muhammad Uzair Shaikh and Amir Ali Bhutto, Advocates for applicant. Mr. Saeed Jamal Lund, Advocate for respondents No.11 to 13. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General along with SIP Ali Murad Narejo of SSP Office, Khairpur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This application is disposed of with consent, after some hearing, in the terms whereby focal person of SSP Khairpur undertakes that if any complaint is filed against the applicant by any aggrieved person, it would be purely dealt with in terms of Section 154 CrPC, if a cognizable office is made out. However, if a cognizable offence is not made out, the same would be dealt with U/S 155 CrPC. Cr. Misc. App. is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
